arts.ttl: Viktor Gyokeres issues transfer message amid Arsenal interest
arts.sum: The Sweden international has emerged as a key transfer target for the Gunners following the appointment of Andrea Berta as their new sporting director and Arsenal are expected to intensify their pursuit of the 26-year-old over the next few weeks. However, the former are currently his most likely destination as Arteta pushes to bring Gyokeres to the Emirates Stadium amid his pursuit of a prolific new centre forward.

arts.sum: Rafael van der Vaart is no stranger to irking people with his brazen approach to punditry. arts.ttl: Fabrizio Romano announces Dean Huijsen transfer amid Arsenal, Chelsea, Liverpool and Real Madrid links
arts.sum: Real Madrid have been heavily linked with Huijsen, and it appears to be his dream move, but Los Blancos have yet to decide whether they will actually look to add a centre-back this summer, which has given Premier League clubs an advantage. Fabrizio Romano has confirmed that Dean Huijsen will likely stay in the Premier League this summer.
